About Contact
Affiliate disclosure

How affiliate links are used on Urban Harvest Lab.

Some articles may include affiliate links. If you click one of those links and make a purchase, Urban Harvest Lab may earn a commission at no additional cost to you.

Editorial independence

Recommendations are chosen for usefulness, not commission

A commission does not decide what gets recommended. If a cheaper option, a simpler setup, or no purchase at all makes more sense, that is what the guide will say.

Disclosure placement

How readers are informed

When an article includes affiliate links, the disclosure appears near the top so readers can see it before any product recommendations.

Reader-first policy

Sometimes the best answer is “skip it”

Some problems are better solved by changing the setup, not by adding more gear. When that happens, the guide says so plainly.

Questions

Need clarification?

Use the contact page if you want to ask how a product recommendation was framed or whether a link is commercial in nature.

Urban Harvest Lab

Calm, practical growing guidance for balconies, patios, and indoor shelves.

Science-based guides for urban gardening, hydroponics, grow lights, and small-space food growing.
